testcase.name: test_create_predio_nuevo
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration29.py:216: in test_create_predio_nuevo assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create predio: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create predio: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","r1"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"codigo_predial_nacional":"TEST_EDIT_20260204222321","municipio":"TEST_MUNICIPIO","direccion":"Test Address for Edit","destino_economico":"Residencial","area_terreno":100,"area_construida":50},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","gestor_apoyo_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"codigo_predial_nacional":"TEST_EDIT_20260204222321","municipio":"TEST_MUNICIPIO","direccion":"Test Address for Edit","destino_economico":"Residencial","area_terreno":100,"area_construida":50},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
